programmes.show_description: Director John Badham is interviewed while filming Dracula in Cornwall in 1978.
Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.
Music
Time is running out for Globelink. During the station's dying days, Sally prepares for her final bulletin and married bliss, whilst Dave and Henry are at daggers drawn.
A brave new world beckons for the Globelink News staff when media mogul Sir Roysten Merchant takes over the station. And the team must grapple with the complexities of covering Northern Ireland.
Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.
Demonstrating with his own collection, Jack Hargreaves reflects on the evolution of the fishing rod and tries one out on a newly created lake.
Flash manages to bail out of the Stratosled just in time; Flash and Zarkov sneak into the caves inside the Valley of Destruction to find Dale and Happy.
The story of 'baby farmer' Amelia Dyer, convicted in 1896 of the murder of several children in her care.
Stephen explores the toll bridge's history, the rise of the A27 flyover, and how it marked the line's decline. S01E05
Jack discusses the history of the river valleys of Wessex. While walking through them he encounters his old friends the Searle family rehearsing their circus acts.
The story follows Duffy and Sharons last big clash, Abbott recovering in hospital after a stabbing, and Dunstables flat becoming the unexpected meeting point for everyone involved.
Alex Dyke presents an hour of bubblegum pop and cheesy tracks to make you feel good.
Eagle One gets lost in space and, as if that isn't enough, Moonbase Alpha has problems.
The story of 'baby farmer' Amelia Dyer, convicted in 1896 of the murder of several children in her care.
Betty gets cousin Albert a job; his chaos quickly disrupts the factory.
Faith is worried that she has been neglecting Hannah and Joe by spending too much time with Bill.
Jane and Laurence are together again, but she has no time for him because of work commitments and trying to solve the relationship problems of her gay neighbours Michael and Rob.
The Champions are enlisted to help a world-famous doctor who has been put under house arrest.
Eagle One gets lost in space and, as if that isn't enough, Moonbase Alpha has problems.
Francis Coudrill presents a unique blend of animation and the European Western in this TV classic as Hank Rides Again. 5/13

Jack discusses the history of the river valleys of Wessex. While walking through them he encounters his old friends the Searle family rehearsing their circus acts.

Jane and Laurence are together again, but she has no time for him because of work commitments and trying to solve the relationship problems of her gay neighbours Michael and Rob.
Faith is worried that she has been neglecting Hannah and Joe by spending too much time with Bill.
The story follows Duffy and Sharons last big clash, Abbott recovering in hospital after a stabbing, and Dunstables flat becoming the unexpected meeting point for everyone involved.
The Champions are enlisted to help a world-famous doctor who has been put under house arrest.
In an effort to boost ratings, Gus presents Henry with a new partner: Sally Smedley, who arrives in a blaze of self-publicity. Henry nurtures plans for their partnership to extend into his bedroom...
George has to decide whether to run a negative story about Sir Roysten. Sally is unhappy about the effects of doom and gloom stories on her personal popularity. Henry's life flashes before his eyes.
Sex comedy starring Roger Lloyd Pack. An architect plans to design a building after the perfect breast and searches for a woman who bares the right model.
Within the decadent Frankenstein mansion, the Baron and Otto create life from stitched corpses, triggering a bizarre, comic spiral of lust, death, and dismemberment.
Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.
Music

George has to decide whether to run a negative story about Sir Roysten. Sally is unhappy about the effects of doom and gloom stories on her personal popularity. Henry's life flashes before his eyes.
Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.
Jack discusses the history of the river valleys of Wessex. While walking through them he encounters his old friends the Searle family rehearsing their circus acts.
A young boy and his father are traveling on a train, and after they have a fight, the boy runs out of the compartment and seems to have vanished into thin air.
Alex, an advice columnist, advises a young woman, to break up with her violent fiancé. The groom-to-be pretends to be wealthy to mask his motive of acquiring the wealth of his intended bride.
A baby is left on Holmes' and Watson's doorstep. The child turns out to be the daughter of a missing French scientist.
Duffy and Sharons rocky relationship gets tougher as they grow up. Sharon meets a thoughtful student, Duffy faces real competition, and pressure builds until something has to change.
Bills rise as Bernard waits for a university job. A friend offers well-paid part-time work, and he grabs it fast only to regret it when he discovers the job isnt at all what he expected.
After 'Hank' Abbotts detective career collapses, he joins the British Army. If theyd known what kind of recruit hed be, their welcoming embrace mightve turned into tightly clenched fists.
On his way to the bank, Bloody Delilah spots the deserted Thunderbird 3 and finds the lads having a tea break in a nearby garden.
Cheese and Egg says he knows a mate who wants them to smuggle 5,000 duty-free cigarettes past the customs for twenty quid. Chaos ensues.
Jane (Maureen Lipman) faces criticism from her boss Diana and mother Bea, while her husband Laurence leaves her, saying she has no time for him.
Jane struggles with Laurence leaving. While her meddling mother Bea hovers, friends bombard her with advice from sex clubs and affairs to becoming gay.
When the crew of a nuclear submarine are found dead, the Champions reconstruct its last voyage to find the truth.
Ken takes on more than expected when he helps a man leave town, while Harry may be sitting on an environmental hazard.
A larger-than-life trader from Hyper-space makes a remarkable appearance on the moon.
An ice-cold replica of Commander Koenig takes control of the Moon.
A mystery planet declares war on the Moonbase.
Gregory Peck stars as a Vatican priest on a mission to hide more than 4,000 allied refugees from the Germans during WW2, under constant threat of death from a Gestapo chief.
Ian Botham and Viv Richards are interviewed at County Ground Taunton in September 1980.
Bill wants Faith to be spontaneous, but he regrets it when she is.
When Bill is ill he soon discovers that Faith is unlikely to win a Florence Nightingale award for her bedside manner.
Songs, sketches, stand-up, celebrity guests, and an all-out assault on the nation's funny-bone, starring cheeky Cockney Brian Conley.

Ken takes on more than expected when he helps a man leave town, while Harry may be sitting on an environmental hazard.
An estate agent and uncontrollable liar assumes the identity of a dead gangster. Guest starring Philip McGough and Saffron Burrows.
Stuart Guber leaves his performance-artist girlfriend to rejoin society, taking a job at a major record label. Chaos begins when his boss launches a bizarre sex-themed game show.
